scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; [ -z "$npm_config_user_agent" ] && exit 0; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.render:build: test -f artifacts/api-server/dist/index.mjs && echo 'render:build OK (built by Docker)' || (echo 'WARNING: artifacts not found, Docker should handle build'; exit 0)
